title: fragaria nubicola
intro: Fragaria nubicola, also known as the Himalayan strawberry, is a species of strawberry native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fragaria nubicola include reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
